data.title: Macy's Analysts Remain Cautious After Q3 Earnings: 'Visibility Limited In The Near Term'
data.description: Macy's Inc (NYSE:M) reported third-quarter financial results on Wednesday. Analysts are largely encouraged by the company's progress, but remain cautious due to margin pressures.

Adobe Analysts Split After Strong Q4, Weak 2025 Guidance
data.description: Adobe Inc's shares tanked despite upbeat Q4 results amid exciting earnings season. Piper Sandler, Oppenheimer, Goldman Sachs remain bullish.
